description: A labeling specialist must coordinate the update of artwork for a product carton following a change to the prescribing information.

nodes.task_description: Receive a notification that a labeling update requires a change to the product carton.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the required text change.

nodes.task_description: Create a new artwork change request in the artwork management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent initiates a new request, linking it to the parent change control.

nodes.task_description: Send the request to the graphic design vendor to create the new version of the artwork.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the redlined text to the vendor.

nodes.task_description: Receive the proof from the vendor and route it for internal review and approval before ordering new cartons.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the proof and routes it for sign-off.
